entries.name: Mewtwo
entries.label: Raids — Day 1 — Mega Super — Normal
entries.source_text: Every Mewtwo caught from Super Mega Battles during GO Fest: Global will have at least one Mega Level unlocked and can be Mega Evolved without the initial energy cost. If you're lucky, it may be at Mega Level 2 or 3.

entries.label: Raids — Day 1 — Mega Super — Shiny
entries.source_text: Every Mewtwo caught from Super Mega Battles during GO Fest: Global will have at least one Mega Level unlocked and can be Mega Evolved without the initial energy cost. If you're lucky, it may be at Mega Level 2 or 3.

entries.name: Mewtwo
entries.label: Timed Research — Day 1 — Mega Super — Normal
entries.source_text: Starting during this event, Trainers can earn Mewtwo Mega Energy X and Mewtwo Mega Energy Y by defeating Mega Mewtwo X or Mega Mewtwo Y in Super Mega Raid Battles and by completing event Timed Research.
